label: BLJ_label
reason: Mario rapidly builds backward speed by long-jumping against the low ledge; after several wall-facing frames, his cap pops up from the square opening and he rockets backward onto the grated platform, sliding butt-first and covering large distances instantly. The scene is Bowser in the Fire Sea (not lobby stairs or HMC elevator), so it is the base BLJ rather than LBLJ, SBLJ, or the Musharna strat.
